title: Aeiroth Pond
description: Modpack somewhat kept in vanilla+ style, for my and my homies.
body:
# Welcome to Aeiroth Pond!
![Aeiroth Pond splash screen](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f2a5199110c8dc31af2858da09b54fdbb0fac890.jpeg)
It's a quite heavily modded 1.20.1 Minecraft, but _mostly_ kept in style of _Vanilla+_. It includes many categories of mods, which expand upon many areas of Minecraft, but also couple of my favourite resource packs and shader packs.
### Optimization
It includes lots of optimization mods that help run a big modpack like this fairly well, although assinging **4-8gb of ram** is recommended!
### QoL
These range from slight graphic upgrades to fixing annoying gameplay elements. [Right Click Harvest](https://modrinth.com/mod/rightclickharvest), [Anti-Creeper](https://modrinth.com/mod/anti-creeper), [Biome Particle Weather](https://modrinth.com/mod/biome_particle_weather) to name a few.
### Gameplay 
There quite few mods expanding gameplay possibilities - farming, combat, new enemies, new dungeons. Many of them aren't that _vanilla+_, but me and my friends enjoy them. 
Examples: Many [Let's do ](https://modrinth.com/project/1DWmBJVA) mods, [Bountiful](https://modrinth.com/mod/bountiful), [Dungeon Now Loading](https://modrinth.com/mod/dungeon-now-loading), [Wizards (RPG Series)](https://modrinth.com/mod/wizards), [Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-fabric).
### Building
This modpack enhances your building capabilities, by adding lots of blocks or decorations, which come from mods like: [Chipped](https://modrinth.com/mod/chipped), [Dusty Decorations](https://modrinth.com/mod/dusty-decorations), [Handcrafted](https://modrinth.com/mod/handcrafted).
### World generation
Many world generation and structure mods are included, which completely revamp how Minecraft worlds look like: [Better Nether](https://modrinth.com/mod/betternether), [Terralith](https://modrinth.com/mod/terralith), many [YUNG's Better structure](https://modrinth.com/mod/yungs-api) and more are included.
### Fluff/Random
There are couple mods just for fun, that aren't really vanilla, but you can ignore them for the most part, like: [The Aether](https://modrinth.com/mod/aether)
```
I can't make promises on updating it regularly, so I'm sorry if anything breaks!
```
